failed_lightrag_chunks.chunk_content:
Please be seated in a comfortable position. Allow your breath to relax. Take eight conscious breaths. Treat your breath with a touch of your thumbs and your fingers. Inhale and exhale slowly. Take eight conscious breaths. Take eight conscious breaths. Take eight conscious breaths. Take eight conscious breaths. Take eight conscious breaths. Take eight conscious breaths. Take eight conscious breaths. Take eight conscious breaths. Take eight conscious breaths. Amen. Amen.

For the next eight cycles of breath, inhale and exhale bringing attention to the pause that happens between every inhalation and exhalation. Amen. Amen. Amen. Amen. Amen. Amen. Amen. Amen. Amen. Amen. Amen. Amen. Amen. Amen.

For the next eight cycles of breath, inhale, as you exhale, chant within yourself, Aham, for I am, I am the limitless consciousness. I am the limitless consciousness. I am the limitless consciousness. I am the limitless consciousness. Thank you. Now bring a gentle touch between your thumb and your index finger on what you have. See yourself becoming light, becoming one with the unitary field of consciousness. Everything around you becoming light. Your index finger on what you have. Thank you. In this space of expansion, hold your desire. See it. Feel it. As so it is in the now. Thank you. Thank you. Thank you. Thank you. Immerse your heart in the space of gratitude for this gift. Take a few deep breaths. Whenever you are ready, may you open your eyes. Thank you.
